query: I have stage IV non-small cell lung cancer, PD-L1 20%, EGFR and ALK negative, and my cancer progressed after platinum chemotherapy and immunotherapy. What criteria matter for a preliminary trial eligibility screen?
expected_response_traits: explains cancer type stage biomarker and prior treatment screening factors
states that screening is preliminary rather than a guarantee
expected_citation_behavior: Must cite only patient-safe public trial-screening guidance.
